---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement to the paper pipeline
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What's the limitation or missing capability? Give an example of what you can't do currently.

## Proposed Solution

How do you see this working? Be specific about the interface (CLI flags, new agent, config change).

## Alternatives

What workarounds have you considered?

## Area

- [ ] New agent prompt (novelty engine, reviewer, subagent)
- [ ] Python tool enhancement (`tools/`)
- [ ] LaTeX template (`templates/`)
- [ ] Pipeline improvement (new phase, new gate)
- [ ] Developer experience (CI, Docker, docs)
- [ ] Other

## Impact

How many users would this benefit? Is this a nice-to-have or a blocker?
